findings.description: Pinned package name 'requessts' (ecosystem=pypi) is Levenshtein distance 1 from canonical popular package 'requests'. Typosquatting risk per Radaro AI-Assisted Development Policy v1.3 §8.2.
findings.fix: Verify 'requessts' is the package you actually intended to install. If it should be 'requests', remove 'requessts' and pin 'requests' instead.
findings.title: Lockfile pins 'requessts' looks like typosquat of 'requests'
